content:
# Environmental Geology

**Summary**: The study of geological factors affecting the environment and human activities.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-alsadeq|Alsadeq, 2011]] applied environmental geology to assess the impact of urbanization on groundwater resources.

- [[2012-al-rowaished|Al-Rowaished, 2012]] applied environmental-geology principles to assess coastal land reclamation.

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] applied environmental-geology to evaluate the impact of drilling wastes on local ecosystems.

- [[2013-mohammed|Mohammed, 2013]] applied environmental-geology to assess the impact of pesticides in coastal zones.

- [[2014-adedapo|Adedapo, 2014]] applied environmental geology to assess soil quality regarding trace metal contamination.

- [[2015-bello|Bello, 2015]] applied environmental-geology principles to address water contamination issues.

- [[2015-akere|Akere, 2015]] investigated environmental impacts of maritime activities on marine sediments.

- [[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015]] investigated environmental-geology issues related to sewage pollution in coastal zones.

- [[2015-malik|Malik, 2015]] investigated the impact of pH and temperature on the biodegradation of PAHs.

- [[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015]] used environmental geology to assess the impact of pollution on marine life.

- [[2015-jawad|Jawad, 2015]] applied environmental-geology principles to assess wetland health.

- [[2016-yasin|Yasin, 2016]] analyzed the impact of environmental/climatic factors on mosquito abundance.

- [[2016-lawal-2|Lawal, 2016]] applied environmental geology to assess particulate matter sources.

- [[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016]] applied environmental-geology to address heavy metal contamination in water.

- [[2017-budiyanto|Budiyanto, 2017]] addressed environmental geology by investigating pyrene degradation in saline environments.

- [[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017]] addressed issues within the scope of environmental-geology regarding heavy metal contamination.

- [[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018]] investigated the impact of oil-related activities on marine ecosystems.

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] applied environmental geology to assess air quality through particulate matter analysis.

- [[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019]] investigated the role of mangroves as natural filters for pollutants.

- [[2019-alhaiqi|Alhaiqi, 2019]] applied environmental geology principles to address soil contamination from petroleum products.

- [[2019-ahmed|Ahmed, 2019]] applied environmental-geology principles to identify nitrate contamination sources.

- [[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022]] addressed issues within the scope of environmental-geology.

- [[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023]] applied environmental geology to assess coastal lagoon health.

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] evaluated environmental conditions to determine the impact on biological communities.

- [[2024-mohamed|Mohamed, 2024]] investigated environmentally friendly flowback additives to ensure sustainable practices.

- [[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025]] applied environmental-geology principles to address CO2 mitigation via mineral carbonation.

- [[2015-jawad|Jawad, 2015]] applied environmental-geology principles to assess wetland health.

- [[2016-yasin|Yasin, 2016]] analyzed the impact of environmental/climatic factors on mosquito abundance.

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2011-alsadeq|Alsadeq, 2011]] ['hydrochemical-analysis', 'ion-chromatography']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Urbanization and industrial activity in Tarout Island pose significant risks to local water resources. ([[2011-alsadeq|Alsadeq, 2011, p. 20]])

- Not stated in source ([[2012-al-rowaished|Al-Rowaished, 2012]])

- Drilling waste poses risks such as benthic smothering, toxicity, and heavy metal contamination. ([[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012, p. 28]])

- Sediment samples showed varying levels of pesticide accumulation based on location and season. ([[2013-mohammed|Mohammed, 2013, p. 39]])

- Soil serves as an indicator of trace metal pollution in the local environment. ([[2014-adedapo|Adedapo, 2014, p. 23]])

- Phytoremediation is an eco-friendly alternative to chemical treatment methods. ([[2015-bello|Bello, 2015, p. 23]])

- Assessment of organotins in sediment and biota. ([[2015-akere|Akere, 2015, p. 85]])

- Sewage outfalls significantly influenced both water quality and microbial characteristics of the coast. ([[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015, p. 53]])

- Optimal degradation was observed at circum-neutral pH (7.0) and mesothermic temperatures (37°C). ([[2015-malik|Malik, 2015, p. 101]])

- Pollution and seasonal dynamics significantly influence foraminiferal distribution patterns. ([[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015, p. 31]])

- GIS is a key tool for identifying risks in land use, soil types, and water resources. ([[2015-jawad|Jawad, 2015, p. 21]])

- Temperature, relative humidity, and rainfall are identified as critical abiotic factors influencing the reproduction and survival of mosquitoes. ([[2016-yasin|Yasin, 2016, p. 21]])

- Identified mineralogical components as calcite and montmorillonite across all sites. ([[2016-lawal-2|Lawal, 2016, p. 95]])

- Not stated in source ([[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016]])

- Pyrene is a persistent pollutant that poses risks to the environment, especially in hypersaline conditions. ([[2017-budiyanto|Budiyanto, 2017, p. 81]])

- Fly ash, an industrial waste, was repurposed for environmental remediation of water sources. ([[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017, p. 14]])

- Assessed the suitability of local species as bioindicators for monitoring coastal impacts. ([[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018, p. 17]])

- Used mineralogical characterization to understand the source and nature of airborne particles. ([[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019, p. 134]])

- Avicennia marina is an efficient species for sequestering petroleum hydrocarbons. ([[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019, p. 16]])

- Phytoremediation was identified as a green, cost-effective method for local remediation. ([[2019-alhaiqi|Alhaiqi, 2019, p. 14]])

- Nitrate is primarily sourced from synthetic fertilizers and atmospheric deposition. ([[2019-ahmed|Ahmed, 2019, p. 61]])

- Not stated in source ([[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022]])

- Uqair Lagoon serves as a pristine reference site for marine studies. ([[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023, p. 14]])

- Sediment was predominantly sand-sized (95-99%), suggesting local sourcing from dunes or aeolian deposits. ([[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023, p. 54]])

- Ionic liquids were selected as a more sustainable alternative to conventional additives. ([[2024-mohamed|Mohamed, 2024]])

- Surface mineralization offers the potential for permanent storage of CO2 by converting it into stable carbonate minerals. ([[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025, p. 25]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2011-alsadeq|Alsadeq, 2011]] Contamination from septic tanks and industrial waste in urban areas.
